environment_prompt: A modern minimalist living room with a neutral beige-and-wood color palette, a large L-shaped light-colored sectional sofa with soft gray cushions, a round low wooden coffee table on a circular jute area rug, a built-in wall unit with open shelves featuring warm ambient lighting and decorative objects, a large wall-mounted flat-screen TV on a white ribbed panel wall, floor-to-ceiling windows on the right side with operable handles allowing abundant natural daylight, light wood flooring, elegant and calm atmosphere. Off-screen to the left: an adjacent hallway or room entrance from which a person can walk into the living room. Beyond the floor-to-ceiling windows: an outdoor balcony or garden area with fresh air that can enter once the window is opened.
perspective_prompt: First-person point of view at standing eye height, wide-angle interior perspective looking toward the TV wall and sofa area.

interactions.action: The wall-mounted TV turns on, displays a brief startup animation, and then begins playing a cartoon.
A woman wearing blue clothing enters from the left side of the frame and walks to the sofa.
The woman walks to the floor-to-ceiling window and opens it.
